title: Bare Bones X Species
body:
**This is a Bare Bones port for users who wants to play Species.**

- [all credits reserved for Ninnih](https://x.com/Ninnih_)

**Species is a high quality vanilla-plus mod that adds random fantasy mobs to Minecraft!**


**CREDITS:**
- [Ninnih - Original/Mod Creator](https://x.com/Ninnih_)
- [MystieFox - Resource Pack Creator](https://twitter.com/awaiiuu)
